nasb.text: And Barnabas and Saul returned from Jerusalem when they had fulfilled their mission, taking along with them John, who was also called Mark.

esv.text: And Barnabas and Saul returned from Jerusalem when they had completed their service, bringing with them John, whose other name was Mark.

cnv.text: 巴拿巴和掃羅完成了送交捐項的任務，就帶著名叫馬可的約翰，從耶路撒冷回來。

ccb.text: 巴拿巴和扫罗把款项送到以后，就带着约翰·马可从耶路撒冷回去。

csbs.text: 巴拿巴和扫罗完成了那服事的工作，就带着那称为马可的约翰，从耶路撒冷回去了。
